name: @ts-doctor/rules-error-handling-effect
description: Effect-native rewrite of ts-doctor's `error-handling` rule category (RULE-025): 6 SYN AST predicates (no-empty-catch, no-error-message-matching, no-ex-assign, no-throw-in-finally, no-useless-catch, prefer-error-instantiation) + 2 TYP type-aware predicates (only-throw-error, prefer-promise-reject-errors). Strangler-fig slice — consumes @ts-doctor/rules-core-effect for the rule substrate (defineRule/runRule/runTypeAwareRule/Rule/RuleContext) and @ts-doctor/contracts-effect for the Diagnostic/RuleMeta contracts. Plain-TS AST predicates wrapping the TS compiler API — NOT Effect-wrapped (visitors are sync). Preserves the RULE-026 broken auto-fix in prefer-error-instantiation (declares auto-fix, emits no fix).
